arts.ttl: Video: Watch Former PSG Star Neymar Reveals Return to Santos in Heartfelt Message
arts.sum: Former Paris Saint-Germain star Neymar Jr. will return to Brazil as he announced his intention to sign with his boyhood club on Thursday, releasing an emotional video on X. arts.ttl: PSG’s Warren Zaïre-Emery set for three-week absence
arts.sum: Warren Zaïre-Emery (18) will miss around three weeks of action after suffering an ankle sprain during Paris Saint-Germain’s UEFA Champions League win over VfB Stuttgart (4-1) on Wednesday night. It…

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio on Aston Villa shortlist after PSG make former Real Madrid star available for winter move
arts.sum: Asensio has been on Villa's watchlist for some time now and it is understood that the Midlands club are confident that agreeing a deal to sign him on loan would be straightforward.

arts.ttl: PSG star Gianluigi Donnarumma makes clear statement about his career plans after being linked with Inter Milan
arts.sum: Donnarumma, 25, has won three Ligue 1 titles and racked up 135 PSG appearances since moving to the Parc des Princes from AC Milan in 2021. He was recently linked with a potential return to Italy.

arts.ttl: PSG's quest to finish the domestic season unbeaten continues with a trip to Brest
arts.sum: Coach Eric Roy’s team joined PSG, Brest and Monaco in qualifying for the Champions League playoff spots . Brest is next in line as defending champion Paris Saint-Germain tries to stay unbeaten in the French league.
